name: Last Word in Nutmeg Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. Grease the muffin tins.
3. In a medium-size bowl, stir together thoroughly combining flour, sugar, baking powder, grated nutmeg, and salt.
4. Beat the egg well in a small bowl. Stir in the heavy cream, milk, and melted butter until blended well.
5. Add the cream mixture to the flour mixture and stir only until there are no streaks of flour remaining. Do not overmix.
6. Spoon batter two-thirds full into each muffin cup.
7. Bake for about 20 minutes, or until topped are lightly golden.
8. Remove muffins from the pan and serve warm. Alternatively, cool on a rack and store or freeze for later use; warm before serving.
